title: genetic relation and eva piloting
wikitext:
[]: genetic relation and eva piloting             Quote Post by Defectron » Tue Feb 27, 2007 3:31 pm Awhile ago there was a theory that in order to pilot evas you need to be either genetically related to the person inside the eva, or you need to be an angel like Kaworu. This theory came up mostly because they didn't have Shinji try to synch with unit 2 when he and Rei switched evas during that one synch test. But as I was rewatching eva today, I noticed there was a big gaping hole in this theory! In Asuka strikes, when Asuka and Shinji are in unit 02, it opens Gaghiels mouth due to their combined efforts. Now some of you might say "Maybe it was actually just Asuka" but this can be proven wrong, because as Ritsuko was looking over the data from that battle either her or Misato said that they both broke their synch records there. So I think this proves, you don't actually need to be genetically related to the person inside the eva to pilot it. But now that this question is answered, it gives rise to even more questions. If it wasn't because Shinji couldnt do it, then why didn't they have him pilot 02 in that test? Also if this is the case, then what's the purpose of haravesting all these kids moms for the evangelions? Is it simply because of the emotional attachment they have to their parents that makes them more likely to synch with the evas? But Shinji never met Asukas mom so even here this is still a problem.

[]: Re: genetic relation and eva piloting             Quote Post by Ornette » Tue Feb 27, 2007 4:23 pm Defectron wrote: So I think this proves, you don't actually need to be genetically related to the person inside the eva to pilot it. But now that this question is answered, it gives rise to even more questions. If it wasn't because Shinji couldnt do it, then why didn't they have him pilot 02 in that test? Also if this is the case, then what's the purpose of haravesting all these kids moms for the evangelions? Is it simply because of the emotional attachment they have to their parents that makes them more likely to synch with the evas? But Shinji never met Asukas mom so even here this is still a problem.

[]:             Quote Post by AchtungAffen » Tue Feb 27, 2007 4:51 pm There's a genetic relation. How else could Rei synch with Yui? The only common thing they have is the flesh. The Asuka & Shinji case is one of the strange ones, even Ritsko is dazzled (Really great information... or something like that she said). Probably it means that even though genetic factor is important, there are other secondary factors which may let a synch happen (there was Asuka too in that entry plug, it wasn't just Shinji).

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Tue Feb 27, 2007 4:57 pm The only thing this proves is that there is just another hole in the plot. Chalk this up to either lazy writing, or the writers not actually having their ideas and technology set in stone at this point.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Feb 27, 2007 5:15 pm I'd say the writers didn't have that idea set in stone yet *shrugs*. I was kinda wondering about that example from episode 8 myself, thanks for pointing it out! "Everytime you see something that doesn't make sense, a wizard did it!" "But what about--" "Wizard!" Sad but true with us geeks and such nitpicking every little thing, hehe. ;

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Tue Feb 27, 2007 5:17 pm Just because they didn't have Shinji and Asuka cross sync with their Evas doesn't mean it was impossible.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Feb 27, 2007 5:28 pm Yup, that's true. Although I *guess* the reason they didn't is because Asuka would synch low? *shrugs* *cue quotes of Misato and Ritsuko refrencing such things from episode 14*

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ » Tue Feb 27, 2007 5:59 pm Ornette wrote: Just because they didn't have Shinji and Asuka cross sync with their Evas doesn't mean it was impossible.

[]:             Quote Post by TriLink » Tue Feb 27, 2007 6:03 pm Perhaps it has something to do with the will of the souls themselves. We already know Yui and Kyoko are calling the shots in their respective Eva's, so they pretty much decide who's acceptable and who isn't. And thus, I think it has less to do with genes, and more to do with the personal preferences of the soul's within the Eva's. Whoever they damn well feel like piloting them gets to pilot them, as simple as that.[/sentencesineverthoughti'dsay] Ornette wrote: (does souls even HAVE genes?).

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Tue Feb 27, 2007 6:06 pm TriLink12 wrote: Perhaps it has something to do with the will of the souls themselves. We already know Yui and Kyoko are calling the shots in their respective Eva's, so they pretty much decide who's acceptable and who isn't.

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Tue Feb 27, 2007 6:24 pm I'm currently of the opinion that genetics and biology has nothing to do with it. There as to be some kind of mental or perhaps "spirtual" link between the Eva and the pilot for synchronisation to occur. For the more sci-fi amongst us, "psychic" would be the preferred term. Shinji's short spell in Unit-02 is a bit of an anomaly. However, he does have a very real talent for Eva piloting and/or perhaps Unit-02 was meant to be a "dual" seater. I can and have spun wild conjectures concerning Shinji's synchronisation abilities, but I'll stop there.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Feb 27, 2007 6:31 pm Anonymous_Evafan wrote: That is a very good point. When Kyoko was not doing so well after Areal she shut herself away and Asuka couldn't synch with her. Yui also basicly told Gendo to fuck off by rejecting Rei.

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Tue Feb 27, 2007 6:32 pm ObsessiveMathsFreak wrote: I'm currently of the opinion that genetics and biology has nothing to do with it. There as to be some kind of mental or perhaps "spirtual" link between the Eva and the pilot for synchronisation to occur. For the more sci-fi amongst us, "psychic" would be the preferred term.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Feb 27, 2007 9:49 pm @ AEF: Amazing feat when that happens with Tines, deshou? I have expereinced that as well. (Such as with concurrency of EoTV and EoE as well as dislike of teh manga versions of Shinji-tachi) Shinji's short spell in Unit-02 is a bit of an anomaly. However, he does have a very real talent for Eva piloting and/or perhaps Unit-02 was meant to be a "dual" seater. I can and have spun wild conjectures concerning Shinji's synchronisation abilities, but I'll stop there. Maybe Kyoko did that to protect Asuka. They were dead if they didn't get Gaghiel's mouth open and all.

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Tue Feb 27, 2007 9:58 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: Hmm...do go on, I'm intrgiued. (and no I can't spell)

[]:             Quote Post by C4 » Tue Feb 27, 2007 10:14 pm I highly doubt that you need to be connected gentically, or have been connected to an Eva's soul to pilot it; after all, all of Shinji's classmates are viable candidates to become pilots, and Nerv can't have genetic material or souls lying around for everyone's mommy. I think a connection definitely makes it easier, and I agree that the souls inside the Evas might at certain times have some say about who it accepts, but I would think for most Evangelions except for Unit-01(which has a strong will/identity), would be able to accept any pilot with some training. That is, you could learn to connect with any Eva(unless that Eva is a crazy bitch), it just takes time, and once you've been connected to one, it's just easier and more convenient to keep piloting that Eva, as opposed to spending that time trying to get a similar synch ratio with other Evas.

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Tue Feb 27, 2007 10:27 pm C4 wrote: I highly doubt that you need to be connected gentically, or have been connected to an Eva's soul to pilot it; after all, all of Shinji's classmates are viable candidates to become pilots, and Nerv can't have genetic material or souls lying around for everyone's mommy.

[]:             Quote Post by Defectron » Tue Feb 27, 2007 11:11 pm Nerv can't have genetic material or souls lying around for everyone's mommy.

[]:             Quote Post by Fearthebait » Wed Feb 28, 2007 1:12 am knowing Gendo i think hes fine blackmailing dead people.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Wed Feb 28, 2007 2:10 am Defectron wrote: Actually it was sort of implied that they did since touji and kensuke we both see didn't have a mom.
